popularStory.headline: BIO

HUGUES Châtelain de Douai, son of --- (-before 26 Apr 1051).  Châtelain de Douai.  "Heustati …

zh.Douai, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France: 法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德度華
zh.Skipton In Topcliffe, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾斯吉普頓 在 托普可利福
zh.Cambrai, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Franc: 法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德坎布萊
zh.lifeSummary: 當Hughes "de Douai" Fleming x於大約1002年出生在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德度華時，他的父親Sohier D'Oisy Fleming18歲，母親Aude DE RUMIGNY17歲。他於1020年之前與Adèle de Cambrai在艾歐洛結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1048年在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德坎布萊享年47歲。

zh-hans.Douai, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France: 法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德度華
zh-hans.Skipton In Topcliffe, Yorkshire, England: 英国越可爾斯吉普頓 在 托普可利福
zh-hans.Cambrai, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Franc: 法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德坎布萊
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hughes "de Douai" Fleming x于大约1002年出生在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德度華时，他的父亲Sohier D'Oisy Fleming18岁，母亲Aude DE RUMIGNY17岁。他于1020年之前与Adèle de Cambrai在艾歐洛结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1048年在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德坎布萊享年47岁。

nameMeanings.name: Fleming
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: ethnic name for someone from Flanders, from Middle English fleming. The word reflects a Norman French form of Old French flamanc ‘Fleming’, from the stem flam- + the ancient Germanic suffix -ing. In the Middle Ages there was considerable commercial intercourse between England and the Netherlands, particularly in the wool trade, and many Flemish weavers and dyers settled in England. This surname is also common in south and east Scotland and in Ireland, where it is sometimes found in the Gaelicized form Pléamonn.
German: variant of   Flemming  , cognate with 1 above.

variants.name: Flemings
meanings: Americanized form of Flemish Vleminckx: patronymic from Vleminck, an ethnic name for someone from Flanders, Middle Dutch vleminc.

variants.name: Flanders
meanings: English: ethnic name from Middle English Fla(u)ndres ‘Flanders’, denoting someone from Flanders, a historical region covering parts of modern-day Belgium, France, and the Netherlands. Compare Fleming .

variants.name: Flemming
meanings: German: ethnic name for someone from Flanders, Middle High German vlaeminc. People from Flanders spread throughout Germany, as well as England, in the Middle Ages as clothmakers and dyers.

variants.name: Flamenco
meanings: Spanish: ethnic name from flamenco ‘Fleming, Flemish person’ (see Fleming ).

nameMeanings.name: Hughes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Hugues Capet ( ?938–96 ) was ruler of France ( 987–96 ) and founder of the Capetian dynasty. See Hugh .

nameMeanings.name: "de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

en.lifeSummary: When Hughes "de Douai" Fleming x was born about 1002, in Douai, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, his father, Sohier D'Oisy Fleming, was 18 and his mother, Aude DE RUMIGNY, was 17. He married Adèle de Cambrai before 1020, in Europe. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died in 1048, in Cambrai, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hughes "de Douai" Fleming x est né environ 1002, à Douai, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, son père, Sohier D'Oisy Fleming, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Aude DE RUMIGNY, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Adèle de Cambrai avant 1020, à Europe. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé en 1048, à Cambrai, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hughes "de Douai" Fleming x um 1002 in Douai, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sohier D'Oisy Fleming 18 und seine Mutter Aude DE RUMIGNY 17. Er hat vor 1020 in Europa Adèle de Cambrai geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb 1048 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Cambrai, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hughes "de Douai" Fleming x è nato il circa 1002 nel Douai, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, il suo padre, Sohier D'Oisy Fleming, aveva 18 anni e il suo madre, Aude DE RUMIGNY, aveva 17 anni. Lui sposato Adèle de Cambrai prima del 1020, nel Europa. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel 1048, nel Cambrai, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, all'età di 47 anni.

ja.Normandie, France: フランスノーマンディ

ja.Cambrai, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Franc: フランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスノードカンブレイ
ja.lifeSummary: Hughes "de Douai" Fleming xが約1002年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスノードドウアイで生まれた時，父Sohier D'Oisy Flemingは18歳，母Aude DE RUMIGNYは17歳であった。1020年以前にヨーロッパでAdèle de Cambraiと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1048年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスノードカンブレイで47歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hughes "de Douai" Fleming x(이)가 대략 1002년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 노르드 다아이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sohier D'Oisy Fleming(은)는 18세였고, 그의 어머니 Aude DE RUMIGNY(은)는 17세였다. 그는 1020년 이전 우럽에서 Adèle de Cambrai(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1048년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 노르드 캄브라이에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hughes "de Douai" Fleming x nasceu aproximadamente 1002, em Douai, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, seu pai, Sohier D'Oisy Fleming, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Aude DE RUMIGNY, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Adèle de Cambrai antes 1020, em Europa. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1048, em Cambrai, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, com 47 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hughes "de Douai" Fleming x родился около 1002 г. в местности доуеи, норд, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция, его отцу по имени Sohier D'Oisy Fleming было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Aude DE RUMIGNY, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Adèle de Cambrai перед 1020 г. в местности Европа. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер в 1048 г. в местности камбреи, норд, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция в возрасте 47 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hughes "de Douai" Fleming x nació aproximadamente 1002, en Douai, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, su papá, Sohier D'Oisy Fleming, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Aude DE RUMIGNY, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Adèle de Cambrai antes de 1020, en Europa. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en 1048, en Cambrai, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, a la edad de 47 años.
